title: 3D Scanner
description: Build and testing of 3D scanner from Open Scan https://en.openscan.eu/. This is just using their plans and documents to successfully build a 3d scanner that uses photogrammetry. My primary intent is to not have to measure objects	that I want to design around in CAD. Typically that means I'll be 3D printing the parts that make with it so precision is not incredibly critical. If I can get with +/- 0.010 in, I'll be pretty happy.
